payload.answer: No durable article memory stored; fetch failed.
payload.decision: Do not commit article-content memory because the source could not be fetched (404/network error). Preserve only the retrieval failure context.

entity_resolution.reason: No stable article entity or content was available to resolve beyond the referenced URL.

payload.intent: Remember the referenced article for future use.

memory_cards.statement: The referenced article at https://example.com/missing could not be retrieved due to a 404/network error, so its contents are unavailable for memory extraction.

details: No article content was available to extract into durable memory.

repair_options: Provide the article text or a working archive link.
If only the citation matters, store the URL as a reference without article content.
